added_sources.title: Micron Technology (MU) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
added_sources.evidence_summary: StockAnalysis forecast page provides analyst forecast context that can be used as secondary support for estimate and valuation framing.
limitations: Secondary source; not official company guidance.

added_sources.title: Micron Technology (MU) Stock Forecast & Price Target
added_sources.evidence_summary: MarketBeat forecast page provides analyst recommendation and price-target context for Micron.
limitations: Analyst aggregator; does not replace direct company or regulatory evidence.

added_sources.title: Micron FY2026 Q2 Earnings Release Exhibit
added_sources.evidence_summary: SEC-hosted exhibit provides regulatory-backed access to Micron's fiscal Q2 2026 earnings release and fiscal Q3 2026 outlook table: revenue of $33.5 billion plus or minus $750 million, gross margin of approximately 81%, GAAP diluted EPS of $18.90 plus or minus $0.40, and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $19.15 plus or minus $0.40.
limitations: Official filing exhibit; still requires analytical interpretation for valuation and horizon classification.

missing_evidence: SEC-hosted exhibit cross-check for Q3 FY2026 guidance table
retrieval_actions: Add SEC-hosted Micron Q2 FY2026 earnings-release exhibit
Carry explicit Q3 revenue, gross margin, GAAP EPS, and non-GAAP EPS guidance into downstream report logic
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: The latest company guidance is a primary evidence block and must override baseline claims that say no forward guidance was available or that treat pre-guidance consensus as the operative fact set.
residual_gaps: Future reruns should automate extraction of issuer outlook tables rather than relying on curated manifest summaries.

missing_evidence: Exact EPS input behind any baseline forward P/E point estimate
retrieval_actions: Run Stage 2C direct computable metric reconciliation
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Valuation is not forced into a single point estimate. It is carried forward as a computable, assumption-based range until the exact forward EPS input is independently tied to source evidence.
residual_gaps: Exact forward EPS input behind any specific TradingAgents point estimate remains source-dependent.

missing_evidence: Direct issuer evidence separating Micron facts from sector proxy evidence
retrieval_actions: Add Micron investor relations and SEC exhibit sources
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Micron issuer and SEC evidence strengthens earnings/fundamental context. Sector news remains proxy context and is not over-promoted into direct issuer validation.
residual_gaps: Long-term moat and cycle-normalized valuation still require a dedicated horizon evidence packet.

retrieval_actions: Add official macro policy source and high-authority market source
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Macro context remains supported, but it is treated as market backdrop rather than direct issuer validation.
